creator: drensink@yahoo.com
text:
spamass-milter port fails to build on libgpg-error 1.5 dependency if older version of libgpg-error 1.4 already installed.

Fix: 

go to /usr/ports/security/libgpg-error

make deinstall
make reinstall
How-To-Repeat: build spamass-milter from current ports as of July 31, 2007 with libgpg-error 1.4 already installed.
